summary: 8 concrete items surfaced from comment-grounded HN threads.

items.name: Big Pickle
items.source_story_title: Running local models is good now
items.summary: OpenCode Zen model used as a free coding-agent option.
items.why_included: A commenter called OpenCode with Big Pickle the best free experience and said it fit personal work.
items.evidence: HN commenter wrote that the best free experience they found was using OpenCode with Big Pickle.

items.name: SubQ 1.1 Small
items.summary: Sparse-attention model chasing million-token context on less compute.
items.why_included: Commenters praised the tech and highlighted its large compute and speed gains.
items.evidence: One commenter said they loved the tech; another pointed to the 64.5x compute reduction and 56x speedup claim.

items.name: Qwen-Robot Suite
items.source_story_title: Qwen-Robot Suite: A Foundation Model Suite for Physical World Intelligence
items.summary: Qwen’s robot-focused model suite for physical-world intelligence.
items.why_included: HN comments treated it as a serious robotics push and asked about alternatives.
items.evidence: Commenters called it brilliant and asked what the current alternatives are for robotics work.

items.name: Hide My Email
items.source_story_title: Apple is about to make Hide My Email useless
items.summary: Apple’s privacy feature for random, forwarding email aliases.
items.why_included: Commenters still praised it as a practical privacy tool and Apple’s best iCloud feature.
items.evidence: One commenter said they love Hide My Email; others described it as the best iCloud feature and a spam catch tool.

items.name: SimpleLogin
items.source_story_title: Apple is about to make Hide My Email useless
items.summary: Proton’s open-source anonymous email alias service.
items.why_included: HN commenters recommended it as a working Hide My Email alternative.
items.evidence: A commenter said SimpleLogin from Proton works great and helps spot leaked email addresses.

items.name: Cloudflare Email Routing
items.source_story_title: Apple is about to make Hide My Email useless
items.summary: Cloudflare’s email forwarding and routing service.
items.why_included: A commenter used it to power a one-click aliasing extension.
items.evidence: One HN commenter said their extension uses Cloudflare Email Routing to create unique addresses that forward to a real inbox.

items.name: Vehicle Motion Cues
items.source_story_title: Apple's weird anti-nausea dots cured my car sickness
items.summary: Apple’s animated-dot accessibility feature for motion sickness.
items.why_included: Commenters called it a game changer for travel reading and screen use.
items.evidence: One commenter said it was a game changer; another said they love the feature and use it regularly.

items.name: Vehicle Motion Cues (F-Droid)
items.source_story_title: Apple's weird anti-nausea dots cured my car sickness
items.summary: Open-source Android motion-sickness overlay from F-Droid.
items.why_included: An HN commenter pointed to it as an open, non-Google-Play alternative.
items.evidence: The thread linked the F-Droid package and said it was an open alternative they planned to try.
